commands.review_summary:
Adds a separate Feishu Typing reaction target for inbound, card-action, and reaction synthetic events, and threads it through the Feishu reply dispatcher with regression coverage.

PR surface: Source +12, Tests +63. Total +75 across 10 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main routes topic replies to the root and the dispatcher uses that same id for addTypingIndicator. I did not run a live Feishu tenant in this read-only review, but the source PR supplies live before/after screenshots for the same symptom.
commands.review_followup: - No automated repair is needed; maintainers should make the cluster/proof decision and merge the chosen Feishu typing-target PR if checks remain green.

target.title: fix(feishu): target typing reaction on inbound message
target.body:
## Summary
- Target Feishu Typing reactions at the inbound message id while preserving reply and thread routing to the topic root.
- Keep the safe fallback to replyToMessageId for flows without a separate inbound target.
- Add regression coverage for topic/replyInThread behavior and synthetic Feishu turn sources.

## Credit
Based on and credits @huiwen01's source PR https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/67783 and its before/after proof. Clownfish is carrying the same user-visible fix forward on a writable branch because #67783 is currently dirty against main and a prior Clownfish pass could not update that source branch with the available bot permissions.

## Scope
This intentionally does not reuse or expand https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/73958; root_id routing remains separate from this retry.

## Validation
- pnpm check:changed
- pnpm -s vitest run extensions/feishu/src/bot.test.ts extensions/feishu/src/reply-dispatcher.test.ts extensions/feishu/src/monitor.reaction.test.ts

Clownfish 🐠 replacement reef notes:
- Cluster: ghcrawl-157004-typing-target-retry
- Source PRs: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/67783
- Credit: Credit @huiwen01 for source PR https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/67783 and its before/after Feishu proof screenshots.; Mention #73958 only as a prior Clownfish branch that this retry intentionally does not reuse or expand.; Carry credit in the replacement PR body and any user-facing changelog entry because the behavior change is visible to Feishu users.
- Validation: pnpm check:changed; pnpm -s vitest run extensions/feishu/src/bot.test.ts extensions/feishu/src/reply-dispatcher.test.ts extensions/feishu/src/monitor.reaction.test.ts

fish notes: model gpt-5.5, reasoning xhigh; reviewed against 340ce0e8f974.
